```{r}
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_plasma_il_6"                ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_plasma_il_6"                ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs
## dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_plasma_il_8"                ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_plasma_il_8"                ]] >      5       ]  <- NA   # obs
## dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_plasma_tnf_a"               ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_plasma_tnf_a"               ]] <     -1       ]  <- NA   # obs
## dat_sub[[ "fl_simoa_csf_il_1b"                 ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_simoa_csf_il_1b"                 ]] >     -4.5     ]  <- NA   # obs
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_simoa_edta_plasma_ptau_v2_1"     ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_simoa_edta_plasma_ptau_v2_1"     ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_simoa_csf_ptau_v2_1"             ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_simoa_csf_ptau_v2_1"             ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_apoe_ncrad"                      ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_apoe_ncrad"                      ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__gfap"                  ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__gfap"                  ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__gfap"               ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__gfap"               ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__nfl"                   ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__nfl"                   ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__nfl"                ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__nfl"                ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__ptau"                  ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__ptau"                  ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__ptau"               ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__ptau"               ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__abeta_40"              ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__abeta_40"              ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__abeta_40"           ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__abeta_40"           ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__abeta_42"              ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__abeta_42"              ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__abeta_42"           ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__abeta_42"           ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs
## dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__plgf"                  ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__plgf"                  ]] <      0       ]  <- NA   # obs
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__plgf"               ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__plgf"               ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__il_1b"              ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__il_1b"              ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__mmp_2"                 ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__mmp_2"                 ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs
## #dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__mmp_2_index"           ]] [dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__mmp_2_index"           ]] > 000000.0000  ]  <- NA   # obs

# 1/10/2025
### CSF
#dat_sub[[ "fl_albumin_index_log2"                 ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_albumin_index_log2"                 ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_igg_index_log2"                     ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_igg_index_log2"                     ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_csf_igg_log2"                       ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_csf_igg_log2"                       ]] < 0.2 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_msd_csf_mmp_1_log2"                 ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_msd_csf_mmp_1_log2"                 ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_msd_csf_mmp_2_log2"                 ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_msd_csf_mmp_2_log2"                 ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_msd_csf_mmp_3_log2"                 ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_msd_csf_mmp_3_log2"                 ]] > 0 ] <- NA
dat_sub[[ "fl_msd_csf_mmp_9_log2"                 ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_msd_csf_mmp_9_log2"                 ]] < 1 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__mmp_10_log2"              ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__mmp_10_log2"              ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_angio_csf_bfgf_log2"                ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_angio_csf_bfgf_log2"                ]] > 3 ] <- NA
dat_sub[[ "fl_angio_csf_flt_1_log2"               ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_angio_csf_flt_1_log2"               ]] < 1 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_angio_csf_tie2_log2"                ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_angio_csf_tie2_log2"                ]] > 0 ] <- NA
dat_sub[[ "fl_angio_csf_vegf_a_log2"              ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_angio_csf_vegf_a_log2"              ]] < 0.1 ] <- NA
dat_sub[[ "fl_angio_csf_vegf_c_log2"              ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_angio_csf_vegf_c_log2"              ]] < 0.1 ] <- NA
dat_sub[[ "fl_angio_csf_vegf_d_log2"              ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_angio_csf_vegf_d_log2"              ]] < 1.5 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_ifn_g_log2"                ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_ifn_g_log2"                ]] > 2.5 ] <- NA
dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__il_1b_log2"               ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__il_1b_log2"               ]] > 1.2 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_il_2_log2"                 ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_il_2_log2"                 ]] > 0.65 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_il_4_log2"                 ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_il_4_log2"                 ]] > 0.025 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_il_6_log2"                 ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_il_6_log2"                 ]] > 3 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_il_8_log2"                 ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_il_8_log2"                 ]] > 9 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_il_10_log2"                ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_il_10_log2"                ]] > 0.55 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_il_12p70_log2"             ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_il_12p70_log2"             ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_il_13_log2"                ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_il_13_log2"                ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_tnf_a_log2"                ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_csf_tnf_a_log2"                ]] > 0.9 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__nfl_log2"                 ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__nfl_log2"                 ]] > 0 ] <- NA
dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__plgf_log2"                ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__plgf_log2"                ]] < 0.5 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__gfap_log2"                ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__gfap_log2"                ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_abeta_4240_ratio_log2"              ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_abeta_4240_ratio_log2"              ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__ptau_log2"                ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_csf__ALL__ptau_log2"                ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_myelin_basic_protein_log2"          ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_myelin_basic_protein_log2"          ]] > 0 ] <- NA
### Plasma
#dat_sub[[ "fl_serum_igg_log2"                     ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_serum_igg_log2"                     ]] < 8.25 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__mmp_1_log2"            ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__mmp_1_log2"            ]] > 15.5 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__mmp_2_log2"            ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__mmp_2_log2"            ]] > 21 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__mmp_3_log2"            ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__mmp_3_log2"            ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__mmp_9_log2"            ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__mmp_9_log2"            ]] > 20.5 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__mmp_10_log2"           ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__mmp_10_log2"           ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__bfgf_log2"             ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__bfgf_log2"             ]] > 10.5 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__flt_1_log2"            ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__flt_1_log2"            ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__tie2_log2"             ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__tie2_log2"             ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__vegf_a_log2"           ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__vegf_a_log2"           ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__vegf_c_log2"           ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__vegf_c_log2"           ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__vegf_d_log2"           ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__vegf_d_log2"           ]] < 5 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_ifn_g_log2"     ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_ifn_g_log2"     ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__il_1b_log2"            ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__il_1b_log2"            ]] > 1.25 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_il_2_log2"      ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_il_2_log2"      ]] > 0 ] <- NA
dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_il_4_log2"      ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_il_4_log2"      ]] > 1 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_il_6_log2"      ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_il_6_log2"      ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_il_8_log2"      ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_il_8_log2"      ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_il_10_log2"     ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_il_10_log2"     ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_il_12p70_log2"  ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_il_12p70_log2"  ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_il_13_log2"     ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_il_13_log2"     ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_tnf_a_log2"     ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_cyto_heparin_plasma_tnf_a_log2"     ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__nfl_log2"              ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__nfl_log2"              ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__plgf_log2"             ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__plgf_log2"             ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__gfap_log2"             ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__gfap_log2"             ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__abeta_40_log2"         ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__abeta_40_log2"         ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__abeta_42_log2"         ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__abeta_42_log2"         ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__ptau_181_log2"         ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__ptau_181_log2"         ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__ptau_217_log2"         ]] [ dat_sub[[ "fl_plasma__ALL__ptau_217_log2"         ]] > 0 ] <- NA
### MRI
#dat_sub[[ "mri_percent_vol_hippo"                 ]] [ dat_sub[[ "mri_percent_vol_hippo"                 ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "mri_ucd_wmhv_percent"                  ]] [ dat_sub[[ "mri_ucd_wmhv_percent"                  ]] > 25 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "mri_mean_cort_thick_mm"                ]] [ dat_sub[[ "mri_mean_cort_thick_mm"                ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "mri_perm_3t_tot"                       ]] [ dat_sub[[ "mri_perm_3t_tot"                       ]] > 0 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "mri_dti_psmd"                          ]] [ dat_sub[[ "mri_dti_psmd"                          ]] > 0.00175 ] <- NA
#dat_sub[[ "mri_dti_freewater_mean"                ]] [ dat_sub[[ "mri_dti_freewater_mean"                ]] > 0 ] <- NA

```


Plot again


```{r chunk-014, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 10}

par(mfrow=c(1,3))
for (i_plot in 1:length(var_list_plot)) {
  ## i_plot = 1
  #if (i_plot > 3) {next}

  if( all(is.na(dat_sub[[ var_list_plot[i_plot] ]])) ) {
    next
  }

  plot(
    x     = 1:nrow(dat_sub)
  , y     = dat_sub[[ var_list_plot[i_plot] ]]
  , type  = "p"
  , main  = paste0("After: ", var_list_plot[i_plot])
  , xlab  = ""
  , ylab  = ""
  #, col   = dat_sub$dx_current
  , pch   = 20  #3
  , xlim  = c(1, nrow(dat_sub) * 1.2)
  )
  #text(
  #  x     = 1:nrow(dat_sub)
  #, y     = dat_sub[[ var_list_plot[i_plot] ]]
  #, labels = 1:nrow(dat_sub)
  #, pos   = 4 # 1 = below, 2 = left, 3 = above, 4 = right
  #)
}
par(mfrow=c(1,1))
```





# Just the plots that Gary wants for presentation

```{r}

## for (n_group in sort(unique(dat_var_label_matching$Type)) ) {
##   ## n_group = sort(unique(dat_var_label_matching$Type))[1]
##
##   print(paste0("=== n_group: ", n_group))
##
##   # skip some groups
##   if (n_group %in% c("ID", "Demographics")) {
##     next
##   }
##
##   var_temp <-
##     dat_var_label_matching |>
##     dplyr::filter(Type == n_group) |>
##     dplyr::pull(Var)
##   # label_temp <-
##   #   dat_var_label_matching |>
##   #   dplyr::filter(Type == n_group) |>
##   #   dplyr::pull(Label)

#dir.create("out_new/plot_indy_alb")
dir.create("All_figures_for_paper/combined")
var_temp <-
  c(
    Var$demo
  , Var$csf
  , Var$plasma
  , Var$mri
  )

p_list_indy <- list()
for (i_plot in seq_along(var_temp)) {
  ## i_plot = 1

  print(paste0("=== i_plot: ", i_plot, " / ", length(var_temp), ", ", var_temp[i_plot]))


  p_list_indy[[ i_plot ]] <-
    e_plot_scatterplot(
      dat_plot                  = dat_sub
    , var_x                     = var_temp[i_plot]
    , var_y                     = "fl_albumin_index_log2"
    #, var_color                 = "dx_current"
    , text_title                = labelled::var_label(dat_sub[[ var_temp[i_plot] ]] )
    , smooth_all                = c("none", "loess", "lm", "glm", "gam")[3]
    , sw_smooth_all_se          = c(TRUE, FALSE)[1]
    , smooth_by_var_color       = c("none", "loess", "lm", "glm", "gam")[1]
    , sw_smooth_by_var_color_se = c(TRUE, FALSE)[2]
    , sw_corr_in_subtitle       = c(TRUE, FALSE)[1]
    )
  # p_list_indy[[ i_plot ]] <-
  #   p_list_indy[[ i_plot ]] +
  #   #theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  #   labs(
  #     y = "CSF Albumin Index, log2"  #paste0("log2( ", "Albumin index", " )")
  #   , x = label_temp[i_plot]  #paste0("log2( ", label_temp[i_plot], " )")
  #   )


  # individual plots
  ggsave(
      #paste0("out/plot_scatterplot_albumin_", n_group, ".png")
      paste0("out_new/plot_indy_alb/plot_scatterplot_albumin_", var_temp[i_plot], ".png")
    , plot   = p_list_indy[[ i_plot ]]
    , width  = 6
    , height = 6
    ## png, jpeg
    , dpi    = 300
    , bg     = "white"
    ## pdf
    #, units  = "in"
    #, useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd
    )

} # i_plot

##   # p_arranged <-
##   #   cowplot::plot_grid(
##   #     plotlist = p_list
##   #   , nrow = 1
##   #   , ncol = NULL
##   #   , labels="AUTO"
##   #   )
##   #
##   # p_arranged |> print()
##
##   p_arranged <-
##     patchwork::wrap_plots(
##       p_list
##     , nrow = 3
##     , ncol = 4
##     , tag_level = "new"
##     , guides = "collect"
##     ) +
##     #patchwork::guide_area() +
##     patchwork::plot_annotation(
##     #  title = n_group
##       title = NULL
##     , subtitle = NULL
##     , caption =
##         paste0(
##         #  "Black line is the overall least squares regression line.  Colored lines are by diagnosis group.  Dashed ellipse is a 95% confidence ellipse using the t-distribution."
##           "Black line is the overall least squares regression line.  Dashed ellipse is a 95% confidence ellipse using the t-distribution."
##         )
##     , tag_levels = NULL
##     , tag_prefix = NULL
##     , tag_suffix = NULL
##     , tag_sep = NULL
##     , theme = NULL
##     )
##     #+
##     #theme(plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0)) # Default is hjust=1, Caption align left
##   #p_arranged |> print()
##
##   ggsave(
##       #paste0("out/plot_scatterplot_albumin_", n_group, ".png")
##       paste0("out/plot_scatterplot_albumin_", ".png")
##     , plot   = p_arranged
##     , width  = 12
##     , height = 12
##     ## png, jpeg
##     , dpi    = 300
##     , bg     = "white"
##     ## pdf
##     #, units  = "in"
##     #, useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd
##     )
##
## } # n_group

```



## Original code for Laura's paper starts here

```{r chunk-01}
#library(erikmisc)
#library(tidyverse)
#library(corrplot)
#library(broom)
#library(dunn.test)
#library(ggpubr)
## devtools::install_github("vincentarelbundock/modelsummary")
#library(modelsummary)
#
#dir.create("out_new")
#
#dat_sheet <- read.csv("PermeabilityAnalysis.Final.csv")
#
#dat_var_label_matching <-
#  tibble::tribble(
#    ~Var                      , ~Label                          , ~Type   # plot facet type labels
#  , "demo_study_id"           , "Study ID"                      , "ID"
#  , "dx_current"              , "Current Dx"                    , "Demographics"
#  , "demo_sex"                , "Gender"                        , "Demographics"
#  , "demo_yrs_edu"            , "Years of Education"            , "Demographics"
#  , "demo_bl_age"             , "Age"                           , "Demographics"
#  #, "fl_abeta_4240_ratio"     , "ABeta Ratio (42/40)"           , "AD" #"Alzheimers Biomarkers"
#  #, "fl_albumin_index"        , "Albumin Index"                 , "Permeability"
#  #, "fl_angio_csf_bfgf"       , "bFgF"                          , "Angiogenic Factors"
#  #, "fl_angio_csf_flt_1"      , "Flt-1"                         , "Angiogenic Factors"
#  #, "fl_cyto_csf_ifn_g"       , "IFN-g"                         , "Cytokines"
#  #, "fl_cyto_csf_il_1b"       , "IL-1b"                         , "Cytokines"
#  #, "fl_cyto_csf_il_2"        , "IL-2"                          , "Cytokines"
#  #, "fl_cyto_csf_il_4"        , "IL-4"                          , "Cytokines"
#  #, "fl_cyto_csf_il_6"        , "IL-6"                          , "Cytokines"
#  #, "fl_cyto_csf_il_8"        , "IL-8"                          , "Cytokines"
#  #, "fl_igg_index"            , "IgG Index"                     , "Other"
#  #, "fl_msd_csf_mmp_1"        , "MMP-1"                         , "MMP" #"Metalloproteinases"
#  #, "fl_msd_csf_mmp_2"        , "MMP-2"                         , "MMP" #"Metalloproteinases"
#  #, "fl_msd_csf_mmp_3"        , "MMP-3"                         , "MMP" #"Metalloproteinases"
#  #, "fl_msd_csf_mmp_9"        , "MMP-9"                         , "MMP" #"Metalloproteinases"
#  #, "fl_msd_csf_mmp_10"       , "MMP-10"                        , "MMP" #"Metalloproteinases"
#  #, "fl_myelin_basic_protein" , "Myelin Basic Protein"          , "Other"
#  #, "fl_angio_csf_plgf"       , "PlGF"                          , "Angiogenic Factors"
#  #, "fl_ptau"                 , "pTau"                          , "AD" #"Alzheimers Biomarkers"
#  #, "fl_cyto_csf_tnf_a"       , "TNF-a"                         , "Cytokines"
#  #, "fl_angio_csf_tie2"       , "Tie-2"                         , "Angiogenic Factors"
#  #, "fl_angio_csf_vegf_a"     , "VEGF-A"                        , "Angiogenic Factors"
#  #, "fl_angio_csf_vegf_c"     , "VEGF-C"                        , "Angiogenic Factors"
#  #, "fl_angio_csf_vegf_d"     , "VEGF-D"                        , "Angiogenic Factors"
#  , "mri_mean_cort_thick_mm"  , "Mean Cortical Thickness"       , "MRI"
#  , "mri_dti_freewater_mean"  , "Mean Free Water"               , "MRI"
#  , "percent_hippo"           , "Percent Hippocampal Volume"    , "MRI"
#  , "mri_dti_psmd"            , "PSMD"                          , "MRI"
#  , "mri_perm_3t_tot"         , "MRI WM Permeability"           , "Permeability"
#  , "percent_wmhv"            , "WMHV"                          , "MRI"
#  )
#
#
##separate columns by intended transformation
#totransform.log2 <-
#  c(
#    "fl_albumin_index"
#  , "mri_dti_freewater_mean"
#  , "mri_dti_psmd"
#  , "fl_myelin_basic_protein"
#  , "fl_igg_index"
#  , "fl_angio_csf_bfgf"
#  , "fl_angio_csf_flt_1"
#  , "fl_angio_csf_plgf"
#  , "fl_angio_csf_tie2"
#  , "fl_angio_csf_vegf_a"
#  , "fl_angio_csf_vegf_c"
#  , "fl_angio_csf_vegf_d"
#  , "fl_cyto_csf_il_1b"
#  , "fl_cyto_csf_il_2"
#  , "fl_cyto_csf_il_4"
#  , "fl_cyto_csf_il_6"
#  , "fl_cyto_csf_il_8"
#  , "fl_cyto_csf_ifn_g"
#  , "fl_cyto_csf_tnf_a"
#  , "fl_msd_csf_mmp_1"
#  , "fl_msd_csf_mmp_2"
#  , "fl_msd_csf_mmp_3"
#  , "fl_msd_csf_mmp_9"
#  , "fl_msd_csf_mmp_10"
#  , "fl_ptau"
#  , "mri_perm_3t_tot"
#  , "percent_wmhv"
#  )
#tokeep <-
#  c(
#    "demo_study_id"
#  , "demo_bl_age"
#  , "demo_sex"
#  , "demo_yrs_edu"
#  , "dx_current"
#  , "percent_hippo"
#  , "mri_mean_cort_thick_mm"
#  , "fl_abeta_4240_ratio"
#  )
#
#dx.tokeep <-
#  c("LA", "MX", "SIVD", "AD")
#
## format data
#dat_sheet <-
#  dat_sheet %>%
#  dplyr::select(
#    all_of(tokeep)
#  , all_of(totransform.log2)
#  ) %>%
#  dplyr::filter(
#    dx_current %in% dx.tokeep
#  ) %>%
#  dplyr::mutate(
#    dx_current    = dx_current
#  , demo_sex      = ifelse(demo_sex == "", NA, demo_sex) %>% factor()
#  , dx_current    = dx_current %>% factor()
#  , demo_study_id = demo_study_id %>% factor()
#  )
```



## Plots for outliers

```{r, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 10}
## var_list_plot <-
##   c(totransform.log2, tokeep)
##
## par(mfrow=c(1,3))
## for (i_plot in seq_along(var_list_plot)) {
##   ## i_plot = 1
##   #if (i_plot > 3) {next}
##
##   plot(
##     x     = 1:nrow(dat_sheet)
##   , y     = dat_sheet[[ var_list_plot[i_plot] ]]
##   , type  = "p"
##   , main  = paste0("Before: ", var_list_plot[i_plot])
##   , xlab  = ""
##   , ylab  = ""
##   , col   = dat_sheet$dx_current
##   , pch   = 20  #3
##   , xlim  = c(1, nrow(dat_sheet) * 1.2)
##   )
##   text(
##     x     = 1:nrow(dat_sheet)
##   , y     = dat_sheet[[ var_list_plot[i_plot] ]]
##   , labels = 1:nrow(dat_sheet)
##   , pos   = 4 # 1 = below, 2 = left, 3 = above, 4 = right
##   )
## }
## par(mfrow=c(1,1))
```

Determine outliers by IQR.
```{r}
## IQR_dist_max <- 5
##
## tab_outliers <- list()
##
## for (i_var in seq_along(var_list_plot)) {
##   ## i_var = 1
##   ## i_var = 33
##   if (!is.numeric(dat_sheet[[ var_list_plot[i_var] ]])) {
##     next
##   }
##   this_var <- dat_sheet[[ var_list_plot[i_var] ]]
##   this_var_org <- this_var
##   if (var_list_plot[i_var] %in% totransform.log2) {
##     #this_var <- e_log_shift(this_var)
##     this_var <- e_log_shift(this_var, min_add = 1, base_log = 2)
##   }
##   this_med <- median(this_var, na.rm = TRUE)
##   this_iqr <- IQR(   this_var, na.rm = TRUE)

##     tibble::tibble(

##     , Value_trans   = this_var

##       (IQR_dist < -IQR_dist_max)

## tab_outliers %>% print(n=Inf)
```



Drop extreme outlying values.
```{r chunk-02}
# # Drop extreme outlying values
# # dat_sheet$fl_albumin_index       [dat_sheet$fl_albumin_index              ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$mri_dti_freewater_mean [dat_sheet$mri_dti_freewater_mean        ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$mri_dti_psmd           [dat_sheet$mri_dti_psmd                  ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_myelin_basic_protein[dat_sheet$fl_myelin_basic_protein       ] <- NA  # obs
# dat_sheet$fl_igg_index           [dat_sheet$fl_igg_index               <  0.2  ] <- NA  # obs 139
# # dat_sheet$fl_angio_csf_bfgf      [dat_sheet$fl_angio_csf_bfgf             ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_angio_csf_flt_1     [dat_sheet$fl_angio_csf_flt_1            ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_angio_csf_plgf      [dat_sheet$fl_angio_csf_plgf             ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_angio_csf_tie2      [dat_sheet$fl_angio_csf_tie2             ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_angio_csf_vegf_a    [dat_sheet$fl_angio_csf_vegf_a           ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_angio_csf_vegf_c    [dat_sheet$fl_angio_csf_vegf_c           ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_angio_csf_vegf_d    [dat_sheet$fl_angio_csf_vegf_d           ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_cyto_csf_il_1b      [dat_sheet$fl_cyto_csf_il_1b             ] <- NA  # obs
# dat_sheet$fl_cyto_csf_il_2       [dat_sheet$fl_cyto_csf_il_2              ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_cyto_csf_il_4       [dat_sheet$fl_cyto_csf_il_4              ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_cyto_csf_il_6       [dat_sheet$fl_cyto_csf_il_6              ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_cyto_csf_il_8       [dat_sheet$fl_cyto_csf_il_8              ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_cyto_csf_ifn_g      [dat_sheet$fl_cyto_csf_ifn_g             ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_cyto_csf_tnf_a      [dat_sheet$fl_cyto_csf_tnf_a             ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_msd_csf_mmp_1       [dat_sheet$fl_msd_csf_mmp_1              ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_msd_csf_mmp_2       [dat_sheet$fl_msd_csf_mmp_2              ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_msd_csf_mmp_3       [dat_sheet$fl_msd_csf_mmp_3              ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_msd_csf_mmp_9       [dat_sheet$fl_msd_csf_mmp_9              ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_msd_csf_mmp_10      [dat_sheet$fl_msd_csf_mmp_10             ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_ptau                [dat_sheet$fl_ptau                       ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$mri_perm_3t_tot        [dat_sheet$mri_perm_3t_tot            <  -6   ] <- NA  # obs 145
# dat_sheet$percent_wmhv           [dat_sheet$percent_wmhv               < -10   ] <- NA  # obs 113, 137
# # dat_sheet$demo_study_id          [dat_sheet$demo_study_id                 ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$demo_bl_age            [dat_sheet$demo_bl_age                   ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$demo_sex               [dat_sheet$demo_sex                      ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$demo_yrs_edu           [dat_sheet$demo_yrs_edu                  ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$dx_current             [dat_sheet$dx_current                    ] <- NA  # obs
# dat_sheet$percent_hippo          [dat_sheet$percent_hippo              >   1   ] <- NA  # obs 1, 2
# # dat_sheet$mri_mean_cort_thick_mm [dat_sheet$mri_mean_cort_thick_mm        ] <- NA  # obs
# # dat_sheet$fl_abeta_4240_ratio    [dat_sheet$fl_abeta_4240_ratio           ] <- NA  # obs
#
#
# var_list_plot_change <-
#   c(
#   #   "fl_albumin_index",
#   # , "mri_dti_freewater_mean"
#   # , "mri_dti_psmd"
#   # , "fl_myelin_basic_protein"
#     "fl_igg_index"
#   # , "fl_angio_csf_bfgf"
#   # , "fl_angio_csf_flt_1"
#   # , "fl_angio_csf_plgf"
#   # , "fl_angio_csf_tie2"
#   # , "fl_angio_csf_vegf_a"
#   # , "fl_angio_csf_vegf_c"
#   # , "fl_angio_csf_vegf_d"
#   # , "fl_cyto_csf_il_1b"
#   # , "fl_cyto_csf_il_2"
#   # , "fl_cyto_csf_il_4"
#   # , "fl_cyto_csf_il_6"
#   # , "fl_cyto_csf_il_8"
#   # , "fl_cyto_csf_ifn_g"
#   # , "fl_cyto_csf_tnf_a"
#   # , "fl_msd_csf_mmp_1"
#   # , "fl_msd_csf_mmp_2"
#   # , "fl_msd_csf_mmp_3"
#   # , "fl_msd_csf_mmp_9"
#   # , "fl_msd_csf_mmp_10"
#   # , "fl_ptau"
#   , "mri_perm_3t_tot"
#   , "percent_wmhv"
#   # , "demo_study_id"
#   # , "demo_bl_age"
#   # , "demo_sex"
#   # , "demo_yrs_edu"
#   # , "dx_current"
#   , "percent_hippo"
#   # , "mri_mean_cort_thick_mm"
#   # , "fl_abeta_4240_ratio"
#   )
```

Plot again


```{r, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 10}
# var_list_plot <-
#   c(var_list_plot_change)
#
# par(mfrow=c(1,3))
# for (i_plot in seq_along(var_list_plot)) {
#   ## i_plot = 1
#   #if (i_plot > 3) {next}
#
#   plot(
#     x     = 1:nrow(dat_sheet)
#   , y     = dat_sheet[[ var_list_plot[i_plot] ]]
#   , type  = "p"
#   , main  = paste0("After: ", var_list_plot[i_plot])
#   , xlab  = ""
#   , ylab  = ""
#   , col   = dat_sheet$dx_current
#   , pch   = 20  #3
#   , xlim  = c(1, nrow(dat_sheet) * 1.2)
#   )
#   text(
#     x     = 1:nrow(dat_sheet)
#   , y     = dat_sheet[[ var_list_plot[i_plot] ]]
#   , labels = 1:nrow(dat_sheet)
#   , pos   = 4 # 1 = below, 2 = left, 3 = above, 4 = right
#   )
# }
# par(mfrow=c(1,1))
```


Normalize so color scale is meaningful

```{r chunk-03}
#normalize so color scale is meaningful

# data for demographics, before z-score scaling
dat_sheet_demo <-
  #dat_sheet
  dat_sub

dat_sheet <-
  #dat_sheet %>%
  dat_sub %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # to allow log transformation when wmhv==0
  #  percent_wmhv  = percent_wmhv + 0.00001
  #  fl_cyto_csf_il_4 = ifelse(fl_cyto_csf_il_4 == 0.001, NA, fl_cyto_csf_il_4)
  #  across(tidyselect::all_of(c(Var$csf, Var$plasma, Var$mri)), e_log_shift, min_add = 1, base_log = 2)
    across(tidyselect::all_of(c(Var$csf, Var$plasma, Var$mri)), scale)
  , across(tidyselect::all_of(c(Var$csf, Var$plasma, Var$mri)), as.numeric)
  )
  # %>%
  #dplyr::mutate_if(is.numeric, scale) %>%

# label dataset
for (n_label in as.character(unlist(Var))) {
  ## i_label = 1
  labelled::var_label(dat_sheet     [[ n_label ]]) <- labelled::var_label(dat_sheet_demo[[ n_label ]])
  #labelled::var_label(dat_sheet_demo[[ dat_var_label_matching$Var[i_label] ]]) <- dat_var_label_matching$Label[i_label]
}
```

Determine outliers by IQR.
```{r}
IQR_dist_max <- 5

tab_outliers <- list()

for (i_var in seq_along(var_list_plot)) {
  ## i_var = 1
  ## i_var = 33
  if (!is.numeric(dat_sheet[[ var_list_plot[i_var] ]])) {
    next
  }
  this_var <- dat_sheet[[ var_list_plot[i_var] ]]
  this_var_org <- this_var
  #if (var_list_plot[i_var] %in% totransform.log2) {
  #  #this_var <- e_log_shift(this_var)
  #  this_var <- e_log_shift(this_var, min_add = 1, base_log = 2)
  #}
  this_med <- median(this_var, na.rm = TRUE)
  this_iqr <- IQR(   this_var, na.rm = TRUE)

  tab_outliers[[ var_list_plot[i_var] ]] <-
    tibble::tibble(
      Var           = var_list_plot[i_var]
    , demo_study_id = dat_sheet[[ "ptid" ]]
    , Value         = this_var_org
    , Value_trans   = this_var
    , IQR_dist      = (this_var - this_med) / this_iqr
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      (IQR_dist >  IQR_dist_max) |
      (IQR_dist < -IQR_dist_max)
    )
}

tab_outliers <-
  tab_outliers %>%
  dplyr::bind_rows()

tab_outliers %>% print(n=Inf)
```


### Plot on trasnformed scale

```{r, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 10}
# var_list_plot
#   #<-
#   #c(totransform.log2, tokeep)
#
# par(mfrow=c(1,3))
# for (i_plot in seq_along(var_list_plot)) {
#   ## i_plot = 1
#   #if (i_plot > 3) {next}
#
#   plot(
#     x     = 1:nrow(dat_sheet)
#   , y     = dat_sheet[[ var_list_plot[i_plot] ]]
#   , type  = "p"
#   , main  = paste0("After trans: ", var_list_plot[i_plot])
#   , xlab  = ""
#   , ylab  = ""
#   , col   = dat_sheet$dx_current
#   , pch   = 20  #3
#   , xlim  = c(1, nrow(dat_sheet) * 1.2)
#   )
#   text(
#     x     = 1:nrow(dat_sheet)
#   , y     = dat_sheet[[ var_list_plot[i_plot] ]]
#   , labels = 1:nrow(dat_sheet)
#   , pos   = 4 # 1 = below, 2 = left, 3 = above, 4 = right
#   )
# }
# par(mfrow=c(1,1))
```




```{r chunk-04, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 8}
#get regression coefficients for reduced model

source("./model_sel_new.R")

lm_criterion <- c("AIC", "BIC")[2]

## model selection
f_model_sel <-
  function(
    dat_this      = dat_lm
  , lm_criterion  = c("AIC", "BIC")[1]
  ) {

  if (lm_criterion == "AIC") { AIC_k = 2                     }
  if (lm_criterion == "BIC") { AIC_k = log(nrow( dat_this )) }

  results_list     <- list()
  results_list$mod <- f_formula_init()
  results_list$fit <- list()
  results_list$AIC <- list()

  for (i_mod in seq_len(length(results_list$mod))) {
    ## i_mod = 1

    results_list$fit[[i_mod]] <-
      lm(
        formula = results_list$mod[[i_mod]]
      , data    = dat_this
      )

    results_list$AIC[[i_mod]] <-
      results_list$fit[[i_mod]] %>%
      AIC(k = AIC_k)
  }

  ## some models have a term with 0 df, skip this model
  # first remove models with no error estimate
  results_list$AIC[ results_list$AIC == -Inf ] <- Inf
  # then remove models with 0 df
  sw_df_zero <- TRUE
  while(sw_df_zero) {
    # select lowest AIC, index
    ind_min_AIC <-
      results_list$AIC %>%
      unlist() %>%
      which.min()

    sw_df_zero <-
      any(
        results_list$fit[[ind_min_AIC]] %>%
        car::Anova(type = 3, singular.ok = TRUE) %>%
        pull(Df)
          ==
        0
      )

    if (sw_df_zero) {
      print("Skipping 0-df model")
      #results_list$mod[[ind_min_AIC]] <- NULL
      #results_list$fit[[ind_min_AIC]] <- NULL
      #results_list$AIC[[ind_min_AIC]] <- NULL
      results_list$AIC[[ind_min_AIC]] <- Inf
    } # if
  } # while

  # selected model
  results <-
    results_list$fit[[ind_min_AIC]]

  return(results)
} # f_model_sel



list_var_resp <-
  c("fl_albumin_index_log2", "mri_perm_3t_tot",  "fl_csf__ALL__gfap_log2","fl_plasma__ALL__gfap_log2")
ind_var_covar <-
  var_list_plot %notin%
    c("ptid","age","sex","demo_edu_yrs","dx_current",
      "fl_albumin_index_log2","mri_perm_3t_tot_log2","mri_perm_3t_tot",
      "fl_csf__ALL__gfap_log2","fl_plasma__ALL__gfap_log2")
list_var_covar <-
  var_list_plot[ind_var_covar]

results <- list()

for (i_resp in seq_along(list_var_resp)) {
  for (i_covar in seq_along(list_var_covar)) {
    ## i_resp = 2
    ## i_covar = 6
    ## i_resp = 1
    ## i_covar = 1
    ## i_resp = 1
    ## i_covar = 23

    var_resp  <- list_var_resp[i_resp]
    var_covar <- list_var_covar[i_covar]

    print(paste0("BEGIN  Resp: ", i_resp, " ", var_resp, ",  Covar: ", i_covar, " ", var_covar, "  ===================================================="))

    if (i_covar == 1) {
      results[[var_resp]] <- list()
    }
    results[[var_resp]][[var_covar]] <- list()

    # subset of data for linear model
    dat_lm <-
      dat_sheet %>%
      dplyr::select(
        all_of(var_resp)
      , all_of(var_covar)
      , age
      , sex
      #, demo_edu_yrs  # 3/9/2022 Educ added
      ) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        Y = !!sym(var_resp)
      , X = !!sym(var_covar)
      ) %>%
      tidyr::drop_na() %>%
      tidyr::as_tibble()
    n_sample <- nrow(dat_lm)

    if (n_sample == 0) {
      next
    }


    form_lm <-
      as.formula(
        paste0(
        #  var_resp
          "Y"
        , " ~ "
        , "age"
        , " + "
        , "sex"
        #, " + "
        #, "demo_edu_yrs"    # 3/9/2022 Educ added
        , " + "
        #, var_covar
        , "X"
        , " + "
        #, paste0("age", ":", var_covar)
        , paste0("age", ":", "X")
        , " + "
        #, paste0("sex", ":", var_covar)
        , paste0("sex", ":", "X")
        #, " + "
        #, paste0("demo_edu_yrs", ":", "X")    # 3/9/2022 Educ added
        )
      )

    results[[var_resp]][[var_covar]][["form_lm"]] <- form_lm
    results[[var_resp]][[var_covar]][["dat_lm" ]] <- dat_lm

    results[[var_resp]][[var_covar]][["lm_fit_full"]] <-
      lm(
        formula = form_lm
      , data    = dat_lm
      )

    ## results[[var_resp]][[var_covar]][["lm_fit_red_BIC"]] <-
    ##   stats::step(
    ##     object = results[[var_resp]][[var_covar]][["lm_fit_full"]]
    ##   , direction = "both"
    ##   , test = "F"
    ##   , trace = 0
    ##   , k = log(nrow(dat_lm))
    ##   )

    results[[var_resp]][[var_covar]][["lm_fit_red_BIC"]] <-
      f_model_sel(
        dat_this      = dat_lm
      , lm_criterion  = lm_criterion
      )


    results[[var_resp]][[var_covar]][["lm_fit_full"]]$df.residual

    ### 7/8/2022 report all results
    ## skip if model selection removed our x variable
    if (!("X" %in% names(coef(results[[var_resp]][[var_covar]][["lm_fit_red_BIC"]])))) {
      print("Model selection removed X variable")
      results[[var_resp]][[var_covar]]$sw_sig_X <- FALSE
      #next
    } else {
      results[[var_resp]][[var_covar]]$sw_sig_X <- TRUE
    }

    print(summary(results[[var_resp]][[var_covar]][["lm_fit_red_BIC"]]))

    # plot residuals
    plot(results[[var_resp]][[var_covar]][["lm_fit_red_BIC"]], which = c(1))

    # Scatterplot for fitted reduced model

    covar_names_red <- names(coef(results[[var_resp]][[var_covar]][["lm_fit_red_BIC"]]))

    dat_pred <-
      tidyr::expand_grid(
        X = dat_lm[["X"]] %>% range()
      , age  = c(0, dat_lm[["age"]] %>% quantile(probs = c(0.10, 0.90))) %>% as.numeric()
      , sex     = dat_lm[["sex"]] %>% unique()
      #, demo_edu_yrs = c(0, dat_lm[["demo_edu_yrs"]] %>% quantile(probs = c(0.10, 0.90))) %>% as.numeric()
      )

    ## if (
    ##   ("age"  %in% covar_names_red) &
    ##   ("sexMale" %in% covar_names_red) #&
    ##   #("demo_edu_yrs" %in% covar_names_red)
    ## ) {
    ##   dat_pred <-
    ##     tidyr::expand_grid(
    ##       X = dat_lm[["X"]] %>% range()
    ##     , age  = c(0, dat_lm[["age"]] %>% quantile(probs = c(0.10, 0.90))) %>% as.numeric()
    ##     , sex     = dat_lm[["sex"]] %>% unique()
    ##     , demo_edu_yrs = c(0, dat_lm[["demo_edu_yrs"]] %>% quantile(probs = c(0.10, 0.90))) %>% as.numeric()
    ##     )
    ## } else if (
    ##   ("age" %in% covar_names_red)
    ## ) {
    ##   dat_pred <-
    ##     tidyr::expand_grid(
    ##       X = dat_lm[["X"]] %>% range()
    ##     , age = c(0, dat_lm[["age"]] %>% quantile(probs = c(0.10, 0.90))) %>% as.numeric()
    ##     #, sex = dat_lm[["sex"]] %>% unique()
    ##     )
    ## } else if (
    ##   ("sexMale" %in% covar_names_red)
    ## ) {
    ##   dat_pred <-
    ##     tidyr::expand_grid(
    ##       X = dat_lm[["X"]] %>% range()
    ##     #, age = c(0, dat_lm[["age"]] %>% quantile(probs = c(0.10, 0.90))) %>% as.numeric()
    ##     , sex = dat_lm[["sex"]] %>% unique()
    ##     )
    ## } else {
    ##   # only X is significant
    ##   dat_pred <-
    ##     tidyr::expand_grid(
    ##       X = dat_lm[["X"]] %>% range()
    ##     #, age = c(0, dat_lm[["age"]] %>% quantile(probs = c(0.10, 0.90))) %>% as.numeric()
    ##     #, sex = dat_lm[["sex"]] %>% unique()
    ##     )
    ## }

    dat_pred$Y <-
      predict(
        results[[var_resp]][[var_covar]][["lm_fit_red_BIC"]]
      , newdata = dat_pred
      )

    dat_pred <-
      dat_pred %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        age  = age  %>% factor(labels = c("10%", "Mean", "90%"))
      #, demo_edu_yrs = demo_edu_yrs %>% factor(labels = c("10%", "Mean", "90%"))
      )

    ## if ("age" %in% covar_names_red) {
    ##   dat_pred <-
    ##     dat_pred %>%
    ##     dplyr::mutate(
    ##       age = age %>% factor(labels = c("10%", "Mean", "90%"))
    ##     )
    ## }
    ## if ("demo_edu_yrs" %in% covar_names_red) {
    ##   dat_pred <-
    ##     dat_pred %>%
    ##     dplyr::mutate(
    ##       demo_edu_yrs = demo_edu_yrs %>% factor(labels = c("10%", "Mean", "90%"))
    ##     )
    ## }

    library(ggplot2)
    if ("sexFemale" %in% covar_names_red) {
      p <- ggplot(dat_lm, aes(x = X, y = Y, shape = sex, colour = sex))
    } else {
      p <- ggplot(dat_lm, aes(x = X, y = Y))
    }
    p <- p + theme_bw()
    p <- p + geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 1/2)
    if ("age" %in% covar_names_red) {
      p <- p + geom_line(data = dat_pred, aes(linetype = age), size = 0.75)
    } else {
      p <- p + geom_line(data = dat_pred, size = 0.75)
    }
    # 3/9/2022 Educ added  XXX

    p <- p + scale_linetype_manual(values = c(2, 1, 3))
    p <- p + labs(  title = NULL
                  #, subtitle = "Progress and Starting Current"
                  , x = labelled::var_label(dat_sheet[[var_covar]])
                  , y = labelled::var_label(dat_sheet[[var_resp ]])
                  #, caption = paste0(  "Model fit averages the numeric variables of Age, A1c, and PAM-10\n"
                  #                   , "  over Program, Diagnosis, Gender, and General health.\n"
                  #                   , "Dotted vertical lines indicate cutoffs between depression categories:\n"
                  #                   , "  None-minimal, Mild, Moderate, Moderately Severe, and Severe."
                  #                   )
                  , colour    = "Gender"
                  , shape     = "Gender"  # "Imputed"
                  , linetype  = "Age"  #"Diagnosis"
                  #, fill      = "Diagnosis"
                  )
    #p <- p + theme(plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0))
    #p <- p + theme(legend.position = "bottom")
    #p <- p + guides(colour = guide_legend(nrow = 2), shape = guide_legend(nrow = 2))
    n_sample_annotate <- paste0("N=",n_sample)
    #p <- p + annotate("text", -Inf, -Inf, label=n_sample_annotate, hjust=-0.3, vjust=-1, colour = "gray25")
    p <- p + annotate("text", x=-Inf, y= Inf, label=n_sample_annotate, hjust=-0.3, vjust=2, colour = "gray25")
    print(p)

    results[[var_resp]][[var_covar]][["plot_lm_fit_red_BIC"]] <-
      p

    print(paste0("END    Resp: ", i_resp, " ", var_resp, ",  Covar: ", i_covar, " ", var_covar, "  ===================================================="))
    print("")
    print("")
    print("")
    print("")
    print("")
    print("")
    print("")
    print("")


  } # i_covar
} # i_resp

```


```{r chunk-05}
#create matrices
ind_row <-
  #c(totransform.log2, tokeep) %notin%
  #  c("ptid","age","sex","demo_edu_yrs","dx_current","fl_albumin_index_log2","mri_perm_3t_tot")
  as.character(unlist(Var)) %notin%
    c("ptid","age","sex","demo_edu_yrs","dx_current","fl_albumin_index_log2","mri_perm_3t_tot")
n_row <-
  #c(totransform.log2, tokeep)[ind_row]
  as.character(unlist(Var))[ind_row]

l_row <-
  length(n_row)

n_col <-
  #c("Age", "Gender", "Education", "X", "Age:X", "Gender:X", "Education:X")
  c("Age", "Gender",              "X", "Age:X", "Gender:X"               )
l_col <-
  length(n_col)

# fill matrices with the signficant estimates, leave other cells blank

l_var_resp <- c("fl_albumin_index_log2", "mri_perm_3t_tot_log2",
                "fl_csf__ALL__gfap_log2", "fl_plasma__ALL__gfap_log2")


results_fit <- list()
i_results <- 0

for (i_resp in seq_along(l_var_resp)) {
  ## i_resp = 1
  for (i_covar in seq_along(n_row)) {
    ## i_covar = 1

    var_row <- n_row[i_covar]
    var_col <- l_var_resp[i_resp]

    exists <- results[[var_col]][[var_row]]

    if(length(results[[var_col]][[var_row]]) == 0) {
      next
    }

    i_results <- i_results + 1

    results_fit[[ i_results ]] <-
      results[[var_col]][[var_row]][["lm_fit_red_BIC"]] |>
      summary() |>
      broom::tidy() |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        term  =
          term |>
          stringr::str_replace_all(
            pattern     = stringr::fixed("sexFemale")
          , replacement = "Gender"
          ) |>
          stringr::str_replace_all(
            pattern     = stringr::fixed("age")
          , replacement = "Age"
          )
      , Covar =
          term |>
          stringr::str_replace_all(
            pattern     = stringr::fixed("X")
          , replacement = var_row
          )
      , resp  = var_col
      , covar = var_row
      , n     = results[[var_col]][[var_row]][[ "dat_lm" ]] |> nrow()
      ) |>
      dplyr::relocate(
        resp
      , covar
      )

  } # i_covar
} # i_resp

dat_plot <-
  results_fit |>
  dplyr::bind_rows() |>
  dplyr::rename(
  #  Var   = covar
    Coef  = estimate
  , pvals = p.value
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    pvals_stars =
      pvals %>%
      e_pval_stars(
        cutpoints = c(0, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 1)
      , symbols = c("***", "**", "*", " ")
      )
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    dat_var_label_matching
  , by = dplyr::join_by(covar == Var)
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    e_data_var_labels_table_from_data(dat_sheet)
  , by = dplyr::join_by(covar == Var)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    Label_covar = Label
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    e_data_var_labels_table_from_data(dat_sheet)
  , by = dplyr::join_by(resp == Var)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    Label_resp = Label
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Label_covar = Label_covar |> factor()
  , Label_resp  = Label_resp  |> factor()
  , term        = term        |> factor(levels = c("(Intercept)", n_col))
  )
```


```{r chunk-06, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 10}
#plots

#merged<-cbind(coef_mat,coef_mat_mri)
#merged_p<-cbind(p_mat,p_mat_mri)

#tiff("coef_plot_withtitle.png", height = 8, width =6, units="in",res=300)

# corrplot(merged,method="square",is.corr=FALSE,col.lim=c(-1,.6),cl.ratio = 0.2,cl.pos="r",win.asp = .5,tl.pos="lt",tl.cex =0.8,tl.srt = 80,cl.cex = .6,tl.col=("gray20"),na.label=" ",sig.level=c(0.001, 0.01, 0.05),p.mat =merged_p,insig="label_sig",pch.cex = 1.5,pch.col = ("gray20"),mar=c(0,0,1,0),title="                                       Albumin Index       MRI WM Permeability")

#dev.off()

```

Erik ggplot version

```{r chunk-07}

#dat_plot <-
#  dplyr::full_join(
#    dplyr::bind_rows(
#      #coef_mat %>%
#      results_fit %>%
#      as_tibble(rownames = "Var") %>%
#      dplyr::mutate(
#        RespVar = "Albumin Index"
#      )
#    , coef_mat_mri %>%
#      as_tibble(rownames = "Var") %>%
#      dplyr::mutate(
#        RespVar = "MRI WM Permeability"
#      )
#    ) %>%
#    tidyr::pivot_longer(
#      cols = -c(Var, RespVar)
#    , names_to = "Covar"
#    , values_to = "Coef"
#    )
#  , dplyr::bind_rows(
#      p_mat %>%
#      as_tibble(rownames = "Var") %>%
#      dplyr::mutate(
#        RespVar = "Albumin Index"
#      )
#    , p_mat_mri %>%
#      as_tibble(rownames = "Var") %>%
#      dplyr::mutate(
#        RespVar = "MRI WM Permeability"
#      )
#    ) %>%
#    tidyr::pivot_longer(
#      cols = -c(Var, RespVar)
#    , names_to = "Covar"
#    , values_to = "pvals"
#    )
#  , by = c("Var", "RespVar", "Covar")
#  ) %>%
#  dplyr::mutate(
#  #  Var = Var %>% stringr::str_replace_all(pattern = stringr::fixed("_"), replacement = " ")
#  #, Var = Var %>% stringr::str_replace_all(c("fl" = "","csf" = "","t 1" = "flt-1"))
#    pvals_stars =
#      pvals %>%
#      e_pval_stars(
#        cutpoints = c(0, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 1)
#      , symbols = c("***", "**", "*", " ")
#      )
#  ) %>%
#  left_join(
#    dat_var_label_matching
#  ) %>%
#  left_join(
#    e_data_var_labels_table_from_data(dat_sheet)
#  ) %>%
#  dplyr::mutate(
#    Label = Label |> factor()
#  , Covar = Covar %>% factor(levels = n_col)
#  )

# p-value plot
library(ggplot2)
#p1 <- ggplot(data = dat_plot, aes(x = Covar, y = Label, fill = Coef))  # y = Var
p1 <- ggplot(data = dat_plot, aes(x = term, y = Label_covar, fill = Coef))  # y = Var
#p1 <- p1 + theme_bw()
p1 <- p1 + geom_tile(na.rm = TRUE)
p1 <- p1 + scale_y_discrete(limits = rev)
#p1 <- p1 + scale_fill_gradientn(limits = c(-1.0, 0.6), values = scales::rescale(c(0,0.1,1)), colors = c("#000000", "#AAAAAA", "#DDDDDD"), breaks = c(0, 0.1, 0.5, 1), na.value = "white")
p1 <- p1 + scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", breaks = seq(-100, 100, by = 2), na.value = "gray90")
p1 <- p1 + geom_text(aes(label = pvals_stars), vjust = 0.5, colour = "white")
p1 <- p1 + geom_text(data = dat_plot |> dplyr::filter(term == "(Intercept)")
              , aes(label = n), hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, colour = "black"
              )
#p1 <- p1 + facet_grid(. ~ RespVar, space = "free", scales = "free_y", drop = TRUE)
p1 <- p1 + facet_grid(Type ~ Label_resp, space = "free", scales = "free_y", drop = TRUE)
p1 <- p1 + theme(#axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0, hjust = 1)
               axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 0)
            )  #, panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p1 <- p1 + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) # rotate labels
p1 <- p1 + theme(axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 1))
#p1 <- p1 + theme(legend.key.height = unit(0.30, "in"))
p1 <- p1 + theme(plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0), plot.caption.position =  "plot") # caption left align
p1 <- p1 + theme(legend.position = "bottom") # "none"
p1 <- p1 + theme(legend.key.height = unit(0.1, "in"), legend.key.width = unit(0.4, "in"))

if (lm_criterion == c("AIC", "BIC")[1]) {
  p1 <- p1 + labs(
                  title = "Models selected by AIC"
                  )
}
if (lm_criterion == c("AIC", "BIC")[2]) {
  p1 <- p1 + labs(
                  title = "Models selected by BIC"
                  )
}
p1 <- p1 + labs(
              #, subtitle = "Longitudinal mixed model"
                y = "Standardized covariates (\"X\")"
              , x = "Model covariates"
              , fill = "Model\nCoefficients  "  # "FDR\np-value"
              , caption = paste0(
                            "p-value stars:  (blank): p >= 0.05;   *: p < 0.05;   **: p < 0.01;   *** : p < 0.001"
                          , "\np-values are uncorrected for family-wise Type-I error rate."
                          #, "\nModels displayed are those where X variable is retained after model selection"
                          )
              )

print(p1)

ggsave(
    "out_new/Fig2_plot_coef_pval.png"
  , plot   = p1
  , width  = 10
  , height = 16
  ## png, jpeg
  , dpi    = 300
  , bg     = "white"
  ## pdf
  #, units  = "in"
  #, useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd
  )

ggsave(
    "out_new/Fig2_plot_coef_pval.pdf"
  , plot   = p1
  , width  = 10
  , height = 16
  ## png, jpeg
  #, dpi    = 300
  #, bg     = "white"
  ## pdf
  , units  = "in"
  , useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd
  )

## #p_alb_mriperm_coef_pval <- p1
##
## # ggsave(
## #     paste0("plot_alb_mriperm_coef_pval_", lm_criterion, ".png")
## #   , plot   = p1
## #   , width  = 6
## #   , height = 8
## #   ## png, jpeg
## #   , dpi    = 300
## #   , bg     = "white"
## #   ## pdf
## #   #, units  = "in"
## #   #, useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd
## #   )
## # ggsave(
## #     paste0("plot_alb_mriperm_coef_pval_", lm_criterion, ".pdf")
## #   , plot   = p1
## #   , width  = 6
## #   , height = 8
## #   ## png, jpeg
## #   #, dpi    = 300
## #   #, bg     = "white"
## #   ## pdf
## #   , units  = "in"
## #   , useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd
## #   )

```

Individual plots associated with significant covariates.
```{r}
dat_plot_sub_indy <-
  dat_plot |>
  dplyr::filter(
    term == "X"
  )

plot_results <- list()

for (i_row in seq_len(nrow(dat_plot_sub_indy))) {
  ## i_row = 1

  var_resp  <- dat_plot_sub_indy$resp [i_row]
  var_covar <- dat_plot_sub_indy$covar[i_row]

  plot_results[[ i_row ]] <-
    results[[var_resp]][[var_covar]][["plot_lm_fit_red_BIC"]]
} # i_row

#plot_results


p_arranged <-
  cowplot::plot_grid(
    plotlist = plot_results
  , nrow = 7
  , ncol = 3
  )
ggsave(
    paste0("out_new/plot_results_indy", ".png")
  , plot   = p_arranged
  , width  = 12
  , height = 14
  ## png, jpeg
  , dpi    = 300
  , bg     = "white"
  ## pdf
  #, units  = "in"
  #, useDingbats = FALSE
  )



```






```{r, eval = TRUE}
# XXX-xxx
######################################## ########################################
#######        STOP EVAL        ######## #######        STOP EVAL        ########
######################################## ########################################
knitr::opts_chunk$set(eval = FALSE)  # TRUE
######################################## ########################################
#######        STOP EVAL        ######## #######        STOP EVAL        ########

```



















## Choose scatterplots with model fit lines for paper

```{r chunk-08}

# ggsave(
#     "plot_NAME_ME"
#   , plot   = [[SOME PLOT HERE]]
#   , width  = 6
#   , height = 8
#   ## png, jpeg
#   #, dpi    = 300
#   #, bg     = "white"
#   ## pdf
#   , units  = "in"
#   , useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd
#   )

```

```{r chunk-09}
#comparisons by dx and by patient status

mri.bydx=kruskal.test(mri_perm_3t_tot ~ dx_current,data=dat_sheet)
mri.bydx

mri.pairwise=dunn.test(dat_sheet$mri_perm_3t_tot,dat_sheet$dx_current,method="holm",altp = TRUE)

alb.bydx=kruskal.test(fl_albumin_index_log2 ~ dx_current,data=dat_sheet)
alb.bydx

alb.pairwise<- dunn.test(dat_sheet$fl_albumin_index_log2,dat_sheet$dx_current,method="holm", altp = TRUE)


#albumin vs. mri perm

perms <- cor.test(dat_sheet$fl_albumin_index_log2, dat_sheet$mri_perm_3t_tot, method="spearman")

coor_MRI_Albumin <-e_plot_scatterplot(dat_plot =dat_sheet,  var_x= "fl_albumin_index_log2", var_y= "mri_perm_3t_tot_log2", smooth_all = c("none", "loess", "lm", "glm", "gam")[3],)

ggsave(
    "All_figures_for_paper/coor_MRI_Albumin.png"
  , plot   = coor_MRI_Albumin
  , width  = 6
  , height = 4
  ## png, jpeg
  , dpi    = 300
  , bg     = "white"
  ## pdf
  #, units  = "in"
  #, useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd
  )


library(dplyr)
library(gt)

# Create summary data frame from your results
comparison_results <- data.frame(
  Variable = c("MRI WM Permeability", "Albumin Index (log2)"),
  KW_ChiSq = c(17.118, 18.707),
  KW_df = c(4, 4),
  KW_pvalue = c(0.001834, 0.0008973),
  Significant_Pairs = c(
    "AD-Mixed (p=0.029), AD-SIVD (p=0.006), LA-SIVD (p=0.047)",
    "LA-SIVD (p=0.0004)"
  )
)

# Create GT table
tbl <- comparison_results %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Table 1. Kruskal-Wallis and Post-hoc Comparisons by Diagnosis",
    subtitle = "MRI Permeability and Albumin Index across diagnostic groups"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    Variable = "Measure",
    KW_ChiSq = "χ²",
    KW_df = "df",
    KW_pvalue = "p-value",
    Significant_Pairs = "Significant Pairwise Comparisons (Dunn test, Holm adjusted)"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(KW_ChiSq),
    decimals = 3
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(KW_pvalue),
    decimals = 4
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgray"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = KW_pvalue,
      rows = KW_pvalue < 0.05
    )
  ) %>%
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "AD: Alzheimer's disease; LA: leukoaraiosis; Mixed: mixed dementia; SIVD: subcortical ischemic vascular dementia; MI: mild impairment",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = Significant_Pairs)
  ) %>%
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "Spearman correlation between MRI permeability and Albumin index: rho = 0.136, p = 0.276",
    locations = cells_title()
  ) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = 12,
    heading.title.font.size = 14,
    heading.subtitle.font.size = 12
  )

# Display table
tbl

```


## Figures for manuscript

### Figure 1

```{r chunk-10}
#plots

#basic plots

# Scatterplot MRI Perm and Albumin
bothperm <- dat_sheet %>% select(fl_albumin_index_log2,mri_perm_3t_tot)
bothperm <- na.omit(bothperm)
both_sample <- nrow(bothperm)
both_annotate <- paste0("N=",both_sample)
plot.perms <-
  ggplot(data = dat_sheet, aes(x = fl_albumin_index_log2, y = mri_perm_3t_tot)) +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 0), colour = "black", linetype = "solid", size = 0.2, alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = 0), colour = "black", linetype = "solid", size = 0.2, alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_point(size=2, alpha=0.3) +
  stat_ellipse(level = 0.80) +
  labs(
    subtitle = "Albumin Index vs.\n  MRI WM Permeability"
  , x = labelled::var_label(dat_sheet$fl_albumin_index_log2)
  , y = labelled::var_label(dat_sheet$mri_perm_3t_tot)
  ) +
  #theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  annotate(geom = "text", x = -Inf, y =  Inf, label = paste0(both_annotate, ", r=0.0856, p=0.505"), hjust = -0.05, vjust = 2, colour = "gray25")
  # +
  #annotate(geom = "text", x = -Inf, y = -Inf, label =           , hjust = -0.3, vjust = -1, color = "gray50")

#print(plot.perms)


# MRI Perm
plot.mri <-
  ggplot(data = dat_sheet,aes(x = dx_current, y = mri_perm_3t_tot)) +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 0), colour = "black", linetype = "solid", size = 0.2, alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA) +
  geom_jitter(size=2, alpha=.3, width=0.15) +
  labs(
    subtitle = "MRI WM Permeability\n  Differences by Diagnosis"
  , x = "Diagnosis"
  , y = labelled::var_label(dat_sheet$mri_perm_3t_tot)
  ) +
  #theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-3,3.25))
  #ylim(-3,3)

stat.test <- tibble::tribble(
  ~group1, ~group2,   ~p.adj,
    "AD",     "MX", 0.0013,
    "AD",   "SIVD", 0.0001,
    "LA",     "MX", 0.0171,
    "LA",   "SIVD", 0.0103
  )

plot.mri <- plot.mri + stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test,
    y.position = 1.75, step.increase = 0.12,
    label = "p.adj"
    )

tab_n <-
  dat_sheet %>%
  dplyr::select(
    dx_current
  , mri_perm_3t_tot
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(mri_perm_3t_tot)
  ) %>%
  e_table_sum_freq_prop(
    var_names = "dx_current"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    label = paste0("N=", n)
  )

plot.mri <- plot.mri + geom_text(data = tab_n, aes(x = dx_current, y = -Inf, label = label), vjust = -1, colour = "gray25")

#print(plot.mri)


# Albumin
plot.alb <-
  ggplot(data = dat_sheet,aes(x = dx_current, y = fl_albumin_index_log2)) +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 0), colour = "black", linetype = "solid", size = 0.2, alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA) +
  geom_jitter(size=2, alpha=.3, width=0.15) +
  labs(
    subtitle = "Albumin Index\n  Differences by Diagnosis"
  , x = "Diagnosis"
  , y = labelled::var_label(dat_sheet$fl_albumin_index_log2)
  )  +
  #theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-3,3.25))


stat.test.alb <- tibble::tribble(
  ~group1, ~group2,   ~p.adj,
    "AD",     "LA", 0.0190,
    "LA",   "SIVD", 0.0003
)

plot.alb <- plot.alb + stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test.alb,
    y.position = 2.5, step.increase = 0.12,
    label = "p.adj"
    )

tab_n <-
  dat_sheet %>%
  dplyr::select(
    dx_current
  , fl_albumin_index_log2
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(fl_albumin_index_log2)
  ) %>%
  e_table_sum_freq_prop(
    var_names = "dx_current"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    label = paste0("N=", n)
  )

plot.alb <- plot.alb + geom_text(data = tab_n, aes(x = dx_current, y = -Inf, label = label), vjust = -1, colour = "gray25")

# print(plot.alb)


p_list <- list()
p_list[[1]] <- plot.perms
p_list[[2]] <- plot.alb
p_list[[3]] <- plot.mri



p_arranged <-
  cowplot::plot_grid(
    plotlist = p_list
  , nrow = 1
  , ncol = NULL
  , labels = LETTERS[1:3]
  , rel_widths = c(1.5, 1, 1)
  )
p_arranged %>% print()


# write to pdf or other image format
ggsave(
    "out_new/Fig1_plot_MRI-BBB_Alb_scatterplots_anova.png"
  , plot   = p_arranged
  , width  = 8
  , height = 4
  ## png, jpeg
  , dpi    = 300
  , bg     = "white"
  ## pdf
  #, units  = "in"
  #, useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd
  )
ggsave(
    "out_new/Fig1_plot_MRI-BBB_Alb_scatterplots_anova.pdf"
  , plot   = p_arranged
  , width  = 8
  , height = 4
  ## png, jpeg
  #, dpi    = 300
  #, bg     = "white"
  ## pdf
  , units  = "in"
  , useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd
  )
```


### Figure 2

A. Model summary of p-values
B. Alb vs MMP-10
C. Alb vs MMP-2
D. Perm vs PSMD

```{r chunk-11}

#### Revision 1, Moved up
## p_list <- list()
## i_p <- 0
##
## i_p <- i_p + 1
## p_list[[i_p]] <- results$fl_albumin_index_log2$fl_msd_csf_mmp_2   $plot_lm_fit_red_BIC
## p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.position = "bottom") # "none"
## p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())
##
## i_p <- i_p + 1
## p_list[[i_p]] <- results$fl_albumin_index_log2$fl_msd_csf_mmp_3   $plot_lm_fit_red_BIC
## p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.position = "bottom") # "none"
## p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())
##
## i_p <- i_p + 1
## p_list[[i_p]] <- results$fl_albumin_index_log2$fl_msd_csf_mmp_10  $plot_lm_fit_red_BIC
## p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.position = "bottom") # "none"
## p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())
##
##
## # p_arranged <-
## #   cowplot::plot_grid(
## #     plotlist = p_list
## #   , nrow = 1
## #   , ncol = NULL
## #   )
## # p_arranged %>% print()
## #
## #
## #
## # # write to pdf or other image format
## # ggsave(
## #     "plot_scatterplots_model_pred_selected.png"
## #   , plot   = p_arranged
## #   , width  = 8
## #   , height = 4
## #   ## png, jpeg
## #   , dpi    = 300
## #   , bg     = "white"
## #   ## pdf
## #   #, units  = "in"
## #   #, useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd

## #     plotlist = p_list
## #   , nrow = NULL
## #   , ncol = 1
## #   , labels = LETTERS[1:length(p_list) + 1]
## #   )
##
## p_alb_mriperm_coef_pval <- p_alb_mriperm_coef_pval + theme(legend.position = "bottom") # "none"
## p_alb_mriperm_coef_pval <- p_alb_mriperm_coef_pval + theme(legend.key.height = unit(0.2, "in"), legend.key.width = unit(0.4, "in"))
## p_alb_mriperm_coef_pval
##
## # p_arranged2 <-
## #   cowplot::plot_grid(
## #     plotlist = list(p_alb_mriperm_coef_pval, p_arranged)
## #   , nrow = 1
## #   , ncol = NULL
## #   , labels = c(LETTERS[1], NA)
## #   , rel_widths = c(2, 1)
## #   )
## # #p_arranged2 %>% print()
## #
## # # write to pdf or other image format
## # ggsave(
## #     "Fig2_plot_coef_pval_with_scatterplots.png"
## #   , plot   = p_arranged2
## #   , width  = 8
## #   , height = 8
## #   ## png, jpeg
## #   , dpi    = 300
## #   , bg     = "white"
## #   ## pdf
## #   #, units  = "in"
## #   #, useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd
## #   )
## #
## # ggsave(
## #     "Fig2_plot_coef_pval_with_scatterplots.pdf"
## #   , plot   = p_arranged2
## #   , width  = 8
## #   , height = 8
## #   ## png, jpeg
## #   #, dpi    = 300
## #   #, bg     = "white"
## #   ## pdf
## #   , units  = "in"
## #   , useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd
## #   )
##
## ggsave(
##     "Fig2_plot_coef_pval.png"
##   , plot   = p_alb_mriperm_coef_pval
##   , width  = 5
##   , height = 8
##   ## png, jpeg
##   , dpi    = 300
##   , bg     = "white"
##   ## pdf
##   #, units  = "in"
##   #, useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd

##
## ggsave(

##   , plot   = p_alb_mriperm_coef_pval
##   , width  = 5
##   , height = 8
##   ## png, jpeg
##   #, dpi    = 300
##   #, bg     = "white"
##   ## pdf
##   , units  = "in"
##   , useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd
##   )

```


### Figure 3

```{r chunk-12}

p_list <- list()
i_p <- 0

i_p <- i_p + 1
p_list[[i_p]] <- results$fl_albumin_index_log2$fl_msd_csf_mmp_2   $plot_lm_fit_red_BIC
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.position = "bottom") # "none"
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

i_p <- i_p + 1
p_list[[i_p]] <- results$fl_albumin_index_log2$fl_msd_csf_mmp_3   $plot_lm_fit_red_BIC
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.position = "bottom") # "none"
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

i_p <- i_p + 1
p_list[[i_p]] <- results$fl_albumin_index_log2$fl_msd_csf_mmp_10  $plot_lm_fit_red_BIC
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.position = "bottom") # "none"
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

i_p <- i_p + 1
p_list[[i_p]] <- results$fl_albumin_index_log2$fl_cyto_csf_il_4$plot_lm_fit_red_BIC
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.position = "bottom") # "none"
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

i_p <- i_p + 1
p_list[[i_p]] <- results$fl_albumin_index_log2$fl_cyto_csf_il_6$plot_lm_fit_red_BIC
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.position = "bottom") # "none"
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

i_p <- i_p + 1
p_list[[i_p]] <- results$fl_albumin_index_log2$fl_cyto_csf_il_8$plot_lm_fit_red_BIC
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.position = "bottom") # "none"
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

i_p <- i_p + 1
p_list[[i_p]] <- results$fl_albumin_index_log2$fl_cyto_csf_tnf_a$plot_lm_fit_red_BIC
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.position = "bottom") # "none"
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

i_p <- i_p + 1
p_list[[i_p]] <- results$fl_albumin_index_log2$fl_angio_csf_plgf$plot_lm_fit_red_BIC
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.position = "bottom") # "none"
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

i_p <- i_p + 1
p_list[[i_p]] <- results$fl_albumin_index_log2$fl_angio_csf_vegf_c$plot_lm_fit_red_BIC
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.position = "bottom") # "none"
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())



p_arranged <-
  cowplot::plot_grid(
    plotlist = p_list
  , nrow = 3
  , ncol = NULL
  , labels = LETTERS[1:length(p_list)]
  #, align = c("none", "h", "v", "hv")[4]
  )
p_arranged %>% print()


# write to pdf or other image format
ggsave(
    "out_new/Fig3_plot_scatterplots_model_pred_cyto_angio.png"
  , plot   = p_arranged
  , width  = 8
  , height = 7
  ## png, jpeg
  , dpi    = 300
  , bg     = "white"
  ## pdf
  #, units  = "in"
  #, useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd
  )

# write to pdf or other image format
ggsave(
    "out_new/Fig3_plot_scatterplots_model_pred_cyto_angio.pdf"
  , plot   = p_arranged
  , width  = 8
  , height = 7
  ## png, jpeg
  #, dpi    = 300
  #, bg     = "white"
  ## pdf
  , units  = "in"
  , useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd
  )

```

### Figure 4

```{r chunk-13}

p_list <- list()
i_p <- 0

i_p <- i_p + 1
p_list[[i_p]] <- results$mri_perm_3t_tot $mri_dti_freewater_mean$plot_lm_fit_red_BIC
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.position = "bottom") # "none"
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())
#p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + ylab("Total MRI Permeability       ")
p_list[[i_p]]

i_p <- i_p + 1
p_list[[i_p]] <- results$mri_perm_3t_tot $mri_dti_psmd       $plot_lm_fit_red_BIC
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.position = "bottom") # "none"
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

i_p <- i_p + 1
p_list[[i_p]] <- results$mri_perm_3t_tot $percent_wmhv       $plot_lm_fit_red_BIC
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.position = "bottom") # "none"
p_list[[i_p]] <- p_list[[i_p]] + theme(legend.box="vertical", legend.margin=margin())

p_arranged <-
  cowplot::plot_grid(
    plotlist = p_list
  , nrow = 1
  , ncol = NULL
  , labels = LETTERS[1:length(p_list)]
  #, align = c("none", "h", "v", "hv")[4]
  )
p_arranged %>% print()


# write to pdf or other image format
ggsave(
    "out_new/Fig4_plot_scatterplots_model_pred_perm.png"
  , plot   = p_arranged
  , width  = 8
  , height = 7/3
  ## png, jpeg
  , dpi    = 300
  , bg     = "white"
  ## pdf
  #, units  = "in"
  #, useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd
  )

# write to pdf or other image format
ggsave(
    "out_new/Fig4_plot_scatterplots_model_pred_perm.pdf"
  , plot   = p_arranged
  , width  = 8
  , height = 7/3
  ## png, jpeg
  #, dpi    = 300
  #, bg     = "white"
  ## pdf
  , units  = "in"
  , useDingbats = FALSE  # https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9992275/ggplot2-pdf-import-in-adobe-illustrator-missing-font-adobepistd
  )

```


## Tables

### Table 1, demographics

```{r chunk-14}
# install.packages("moonbook")

# specify tows to summarize and columns to summarize by
list_var_col_names <-
  c("dx_current")
list_var_row_names <-
  c(
    "age"
  , "sex"
  , "demo_edu_yrs"
  , "fl_albumin_index_log2"
  , "mri_perm_3t_tot"
  )

# label variables
list_var_col_labels <- labelled::var_label(dat_sheet[, list_var_col_names]) %>% unlist()
list_var_row_labels <- labelled::var_label(dat_sheet[, list_var_row_names]) %>% unlist()

# This loop creates a table summarized by each variable,
#   but can also specify multiple columns to summarize conditional on multiple columns.
for (i_col in seq_along(list_var_col_names)) {

  # filename root for each separate variable (will write, then read to compile into one)
  fn_root <- paste0("out_new/tab1_vars_", list_var_col_names[i_col], "_summary")

  # run function (additional options are available)
  e_table1_summaries(
      dat_tab1           = dat_sheet_demo
    , list_var_col_names = list_var_col_names[i_col]
    , list_var_col_labels = list_var_col_labels[i_col]
    , list_var_row_names = list_var_row_names
    , list_var_row_labels = list_var_row_labels
    , fn_root            = fn_root
    , sw_verbose         = TRUE
    )

  # read final table
  tab1_temp <- utils::read.csv(paste0(fn_root, "_", "all", ".csv"))
  # display in Rmd file
  knitr::kable(tab1_temp)
}

## For totals, helpful when missing data because has sample size for each row.
# filename root for each separate variable (will write, then read to compile into one)
fn_root <- paste0("out_new/tab1_vars_", "total", "_summary")

# run function (additional options are available)
e_table1_summaries(
    dat_tab1           = dat_sheet_demo
  , list_var_col_names = NULL
  , list_var_col_labels = "Total"
  , list_var_row_names = list_var_row_names
  , list_var_row_labels = list_var_row_labels
  , fn_root            = fn_root
  , sw_verbose         = TRUE
  )

# read final table
tab1_temp <- utils::read.csv(paste0(fn_root, "_", "all", ".csv"))
# display in Rmd file
knitr::kable(tab1_temp)
```

### Table 2, sample size by biomarker and dx

```{r}
#select columns & replace values with logical
data_table <- dat_sheet %>% select(-ptid,-age,-sex,-demo_edu_yrs)
data_table <- as.data.frame(!is.na(data_table))

#restore dx
data_table$dx_current <- dat_sheet$dx_current

for (i_response in seq_along(list_var_resp)) {
  for (i_marker in seq_along(list_var_covar)) {
    #i_marker = 1
    #i_response = 1

    #frequency table
    n_marker <- list_var_covar[i_marker]
    n_response <- list_var_resp[i_response]
    count <- e_table_sum_freq_prop(data_table,var_names=c(n_response,n_marker,"dx_current"))

    #extract cases where both covar & response exist
    count <- count %>% filter(count[ ,1] == TRUE & count[ ,2]== TRUE)

    #replace "true" with variable name & headers w/ headers wanted for final table
    count[ ,1] <- n_response
    count[ ,2] <- n_marker
    colnames(count)[colnames(count)==n_response]<-"Response"
    colnames(count)[colnames(count)==n_marker]<-"Biomarker"

    #bind
    if (i_marker==1 & i_response==1) {
      tab_sample_size <- count
    } else {
      tab_sample_size <- rbind(tab_sample_size,count)
    }
  }
}

tab_sample_size <- tab_sample_size %>% select(-prop)

tab_sample_size <- pivot_wider(tab_sample_size,names_from = dx_current, values_from = n)

tab_sample_size %>% print()

write_csv(tab_sample_size,"out_new/biomarker_frequency_by_dx.csv")
```

### Table 3, regression coefficients with 95% CIs

```{r}
n_sig <- 3

names_var_resp <-
  c("fl_albumin_index_log2", "mri_perm_3t_tot")

all_summary <- list()
i_list <- 0

for (i_resp in seq_along(names_var_resp)) {
  ## i_resp = 1
  for (i_covar in seq_along(n_row)) {
    ## i_covar = 20

    var_row  <- n_row[i_covar]
    var_col <- names_var_resp[i_resp]

    #exists <- results[[var_col]][[var_row]]
    #if(is.null(exists)) next

    i_list <- i_list + 1
    all_summary[[i_list]] <-
      modelsummary::modelsummary(
        models    = results[[var_col]][[var_row]][["lm_fit_red_BIC"]]
      , output    = "data.frame"
      , estimate  = "{estimate} [{conf.low}, {conf.high}]"
      , fmt       = n_sig #list("estimate" = n_sig, "std.error" = n_sig)
      , statistic = NULL # "conf.int"
      , conf_level = 0.95
      , shape     = term ~ model + statistic
      ) %>%
      dplyr::filter(
        (part == "estimates") | (term == "R2") | (term == "Num.Obs.")
      ) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        Y_var = var_col
      , X_var = var_row
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(
        -part
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(
        Y_var, X_var, tidyselect::everything()
      )

    # Gender:X interaction, report Male/Female slopes with 95% CI
    if (any(names(coef(results[[var_col]][[var_row]][["lm_fit_red_BIC"]])) == "sexMale:X")) {

      out_contrast <-
        e_plot_model_contrasts(
          fit                     = results[[var_col]][[var_row]][["lm_fit_red_BIC"]]
        , dat_cont                = results[[var_col]][[var_row]][["dat_lm"]]
        , adjust_method           = c("none", "tukey", "scheffe", "sidak", "bonferroni", "dunnettx", "mvt")[1]  # see ?emmeans::summary.emmGrid
        , CI_level                = 0.95
        , sw_print                = FALSE
        )

      out_contrast$text$`sex:X`[[2]][[1]][1]
      out_contrast$text$`sex:X`[[2]][[1]][2]

      tab_est <- out_contrast$tables$`sex:X`$est %>% tibble::as_tibble()
      tab_est$X.trend


      all_summary[[i_list]] <-
        all_summary[[i_list]] %>%
        dplyr::bind_rows(
          tibble::tibble(
            Y_var = all_summary[[i_list]][[ "Y_var" ]][1]
          , X_var = all_summary[[i_list]][[ "X_var" ]][1]
          , term =
              paste0(tab_est$sex, " slope")
          , `Model 1 / Est.` =
              paste0(
                tab_est$X.trend  %>% round(n_sig)
              , " ["
              , tab_est$lower.CL %>% round(n_sig)
              , ", "
              , tab_est$upper.CL %>% round(n_sig)
              , "]"
              )
          )
        )

    }

  } # i_covar
} # i_resp

all_summary <-
  all_summary %>%
  dplyr::bind_rows()

all_summary_wide <-
  all_summary %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    id_cols     = c(Y_var, X_var)
  , names_from  = term
  #, values_from = `Model 1 / Est.`
  , values_from = `(1) / Est.`
  )

# replace unicode

names_col <-
  colnames(all_summary_wide)

names_col <-
  e_text_unicode_to_ascii(
    text_in = names_col
  ) %>%
  stringr::str_replace(
    pattern     = stringr::fixed(" * ")
  , replacement = ":"
  ) %>%
  stringr::str_replace(
    pattern     = stringr::fixed("(Intercept)")
  , replacement = "Intercept"
  ) %>%
  stringr::str_replace(
    pattern     = "sexMale"
  , replacement = "sex"
  )

for (i_row in seq_len(nrow(dat_var_label_matching))) {
  names_col <-
    names_col %>%
    stringr::str_replace(
      pattern     = stringr::fixed(dat_var_label_matching[i_row, "Var"] %>% as.character())
    , replacement = dat_var_label_matching[i_row, "Label"] %>% as.character()
    )
  all_summary_wide[[ "Y_var" ]] <-
    all_summary_wide[[ "Y_var" ]] %>%
    stringr::str_replace(
      pattern     = stringr::fixed(dat_var_label_matching[i_row, "Var"] %>% as.character())
    , replacement = dat_var_label_matching[i_row, "Label"] %>% as.character()
    )
}

colnames(all_summary_wide) <-
  names_col

all_summary_wide <-
  all_summary_wide %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    dat_var_label_matching
  , by = c("X_var" = "Var")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    -X_var
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    `X variable` = Label
  , `Response variable` = Y_var
  , n = `Num.Obs.`
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    `Response variable`
  , `X variable`
  , Type
  , n
  , R2
  , Intercept
  , Age
  , Gender
  , X
  , `Age:X`
  , `Gender:X`
  , `Female slope`
  , `Male slope`
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(
    `Response variable`
  , Type
  , `X variable`
  )

all_summary_wide %>% print(n=Inf)

readr::write_csv(
    all_summary_wide
  , file = "out_new/Table_2_model_coef_CI.csv"
  , na = ""
  )
```
